name: Jive Software
description: Jive Software — Enterprise social intranet platform for internal collaboration and knowledge sharing.

seo.title: Jive Software — Customer Support SDK / In-app Helpdesk
seo.meta_description: Jive Software: Jive Software — Enterprise social intranet platform for internal collaboration and knowledge sharing.

when_to_use: Enterprise social intranet replacing fragmented internal email
Internal knowledge sharing platform for large organizations
Employee community hub for announcements and discussions
Cross-department collaboration space with search and groups
Onboarding portal with social features for new hire ramp-up

pros: Long track record in enterprise intranets
cons: Modern teams gravitate to Slack or Teams
review.verdict: A legacy enterprise intranet holding on to incumbents; rarely a new purchase today.
review.best_for: Enterprises already running Jive and not ready to migrate off.
review.not_for: Any team choosing a new internal collaboration platform in 2026.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales alone is not HWM evidence.
